[{"Name":"Ray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwlVAPWSLZegukf723ZBNAc7_PGKpit0f6UxlNynG0SlI7gw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot recommend Coverall Roofing highly enough, specifically George and Mike. We had an absolute nightmare this winter with heavy ice accumulation on the house attached to us causing water to damage our house.

Coverall Roofing responded incredibly fast to assess the situation and plan emergency repairs. Since the leak was originating from the neighboring property, it was a very delicate and complicated situation. George handled it with total professionalism. He provided exceptionally detailed photos and a thorough inspection report which was absolutely crucial for getting my insurance claim approved.

The weather made the repairs difficult but Mike managed to stop the water completely and left the property spotless. If you need a high-quality roofer who is professional, responsive, provides excellent documentation for insurance, call George at Coverall Roofing!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D Noronha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKedV7iTYR1r2o04AgJ4XLTSIKQGhoPg3T64sH96I_tzPCp6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had Coverall Roofing handle a full roof replacement for my parents' house, and I couldn't be more impressed with the entire experience. George, was an absolute pleasure to deal with from start to finish—professional, responsive, and genuinely invested in making sure everything went smoothly.

His team, under the expert supervision of Oleg, was outstanding. They arrived on time, worked diligently throughout the project, and delivered a wonderful job on the house. Oleg and his crew were positive, and incredibly meticulous in their approach. The roof had some builder-related challenges that could have complicated things, but they tackled them head-on and completed the work in an excellent timeframe without cutting any corners.

I wish Coverall Roofing all the best and look forward to working with you guys again on future projects! Highly recommended.

Darius","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjHFbxcFFc910EpqV5ZLnPvYZwS-QxEyvNLW3zzu6xaIOz-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our roof done June 2019 with Coverall roofing. After receiving quotes from several other roofers, we realized that working with George and his team was the best choice. He provided a very reasonable quote and answered all my questions even helped me select the best colour. He explained how the project would unfold and the timeline to start the job. They completed the job on time, and left our area very clean. We are very happy with our new roof and would highly recommend working with this company!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICMkqmJCA&fid=0x0:0x1d1e041b5f6f5882"],"When":"2019-8-12"},{"Name":"Russ Conroy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMMpoQCSclc2LxYqG_aqxmN8Ywfud-9_J9czvpm-Rb7mTfWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Coverall Roofing team was awesome, replacing our roof, gutters and downspouts.  First, we met with George Lyons to provide a quote. After taking some measurements he took us through the 2 versions of shingle samples, helping us to make an informed decision as to the best choice for our home. Considering the scope of the project, we thought his quote was very reasonable.
The project started the next day when the materials his team would need were dropped off as promised.
The following day George’s team arrived as expected 8am. We appreciated their promptness and the fact that they showed up when they were expected. That doesn’t  always happen with contractors!
George advised me that he would be in touch by email on the project as well as being on site from time to time.  I met some of his team members and they were friendly, professional, and hardworking; finishing the roofing part of the job in one day!
When roof, gutters, and downspouts were all completed George came back for a final inspection and to ensure we were satisfied.  We were.  See drone shots George took. (attachment) Too cool!
Thanks George and all team members of Coverall Roofing. I will highly recommend you to my friends and neighbors.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICck5XB6QE&fid=0x0:0x1d1e041b5f6f5882"],"When":"2020-4-1"},{"Name":"Caterina Garaffa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVoVtxeKJLAkPzEA_z_uupV6r33UD3PG9M2LcROrisbj9Tpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mark Lyons was a life saver. I called him on Satuday morning in February earlier this year after having multiple heavy snowfalls in Richmond Hill.

I manage a small apartment building with a flat roof.

My tenant called indicating the ceiling in the front stairwell had sprung a leak.

I called Mark immediately based on his reputation.

There was another heavy snowfall on the Sunday.

He came on the Monday morning to shovel off more than 3 ft. of snow off my roof.

This stopped the leak immediately.

He discussed the need for a repair.

The price was fair.

He did it a few weeks after the initial leak weather permitting.

I was away on vacation at the time of the repair, but he sent me videos and pics, and he was in constant contact throughout the repair.

The work he did was exceptional. He explained everything he needed to do and why. He prolonged my roof for another 20 years.

I can't thank Mark enough for his professionalism and prompt response.

I would not hesitate to recommend him.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9A3Bf8GY_PX6CKzh5PWuY&fid=0x0:0x1d1e041b5f6f5882"],"When":"2025-6-23"},{"Name":"Christine Haggarty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLdhKESs98OYV-aY-hy4Y100h52n4_e15erjX4vfEfdorRWIA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"George was prompt with a well explained and reasonable estimate for our shingle replacement job.  The crew worked quickly and collaboratively to do a nice, tidy job.  Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD2w6t8rUi2iknOgoGR9l-F&fid=0x0:0x1d1e041b5f6f5882"],"When":"2025-9-2"},{"Name":"Sam A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVf9i0p_uiMOLEuxhUPF6DLzmmlC7XemQdsxJ7Jca0MVlWp9Y55=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the get-go, Coverall was fantastic. George was prompt to provide a quote for a complete roof replacement I’d requested. He gathered all the required inputs by visiting my home. The quote was turned around quickly and was competitive. He provided me with the options we’d discussed as well. Once we agreed to move forward, he remained committed to the install date. He even reached out to me a couple of days in advance to confirm everything. His crew of 6 arrived on time, were quiet during their setup and worked within the City by-laws for start/finish times related to residential construction. They prepped the site nicely around the house with drop cloths and worked continuously throughout the day. Their attention to detail was top notch, with installing new flashing perfectly to cover off the previous/old exposed areas. The caulking, shingle work, cleaning of the gutters, etc was all excellent. Finally, their site clean-up was superb.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDxwZqgOg&fid=0x0:0x1d1e041b5f6f5882"],"When":"2023-6-9"},{"Name":"David Hardy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3Z59R5HWNokPWxkUnCDkmkliyp2RDi8rC-pNIhDyFS6ngJ_jY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just finished getting our roof re-shingled with George and the crew from Coverall Roofing.  It was a VERY tricky roof, with very little access space between the houses, and they did a fantastic job.  Everything went on schedule as planned, from the quote through to completion.  George was extremely easy to communicate with and when I had questions, his answers were well researched and clear.
The crew arrived on time and worked tirelessly to complete the job in 2 days.  They were pleasant and respectful.  The roof looks great, and the place is as clean as when they arrived.  Even my garden remained intact!
We would definitely recommend them most highly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDK-PbGYQ&fid=0x0:0x1d1e041b5f6f5882"],"When":"2021-4-29"}]

Outstanding value for the money. I would 100% recommend Lifetime Metal Roof to anyone looking for a metal roofing contractor who delivers great value and exceptional results.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAsJEbGA9GhzQAvUsoq0t3I&fid=0x0:0x594fd476b9c5399a"],"When":"2026-1-9"},{"Name":"Rhonda Joseph","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDqO8-WbbW95LK-tNQDKahukAqn6ZS3r3CA9bSUEtNvuDH9EAr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Highly Recommend Lifetime Metal Roof Inc!

I was referred to Lifetime Metal Roof Inc by a relative who had her roof installed last year and was very happy with the results.

After speaking with Mark, the project manager, I was impressed by his professionalism, kindness, and thorough explanation of the materials and installation process. He even made a special house visit—something he doesn’t usually do—at my father's request to inspect our roof, which we truly appreciated.

The crew arrived on a Friday and completed the main work that same day. They returned Saturday for finishing touches, and the final result is amazing. We've received so many compliments on how great the roof looks!

Valentine and his crew were hardworking, respectful, and professional throughout. Mark was incredibly accommodating, and his support made the entire experience smooth and stress-free.

Thank you, Lifetime Metal Roof Inc, for your excellent work. I would absolutely recommend them to anyone considering a metal roof!

Warm regards,
Rhonda","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA4xeWUbM-XzcyYa4Tdl9Jr&fid=0x0:0x594fd476b9c5399a"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Gwen Enright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYOQuPP1RnZKOVhvWXsVvZHr4BKl1oy4frctwjjWRzxNzAVoM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Before closing on the purchase of our house, we discovered that it would need a new roof.  We negotiated a discount on the purchase price and began to research the options, associated costs and roofing companies.   The last time we had looked at prices for metal roofs, we understood why we only saw an occasional metal roof. Nonetheless, we decided to do some pricing and delve into what makes metal roofs so expensive and research whether they really are better.  There was a lot to learn when you know nothing outside of, how aesthetically, they have great curb appeal.  Suffice to say that we learned a lot.   There is a plethora of things to learn .  What shocked us was the price of metal compared to asphalt.  It really is marginal and metal absolutely gives you much better service  combined with longevity.  Once we knew we wanted metal, we needed to find the right company and gauge of metal!  We talked to a few companies including Lifetime Metal Roof Inc.  That is where we had the good fortune of talking to Mark Carter, Project Manager with Lifetime Metal Roof.

Mark has a wealth of knowledge about the metal roofing industry, the actual steel used, the construction methods, installation and how these roofs  protect your home.  The steel used to make our roof was manufactured in Hamilton, our very own Steel Town!
Mark answered all of our questions, explained everything we were confused about and provided colour choices, style choices and pictures from projects Lifetime Metal Roof had completed.
When we narrowed it down to two colours and styles, Mark provided addresses we could drive by to see the actual roofs installed.  Absolute game changer to see the roofing choices on homes as opposed to pictures.  We made our choice and informed Mark.
Mark looked at their schedule and asked what worked for us.  He committed to the work, the timeframe and promised a phenomenal crew to do the installation in one day.  Mark kept us informed right up to and including the installation day.
Valentine and his amazing installation team arrived exactly when Mark stated they would,  and I cannot say enough about how focussed these men were on providing a perfect finished product.  They worked constantly throughout the day to complete our job in just one day, including our garden shed and adding 2 downspouts.  I kept offering coffee and water but their priority was the roof.  When almost done, they reluctantly stopped for coffee because I showed up with it, and then right back at it.
When the job was complete, and they were ready to go, you wouldn’t even know they had been here.  Not a solitary screw or piece of metal left on our property.  Lifetime have a team to collect the scrap that the installation team leave in industrial
Garbage bags at the curb.  Nothing left for us to dispose of or clean up.
Mark talked with me twice during the day even though it wasn’t necessary.  Mark  really does keep his finger on the pulse of the work being done.
We cannot say enough about the quality of the product, the 55 Year Warranty, the very reasonable cost, and especially Mark Carter, Valentine and his team!
From a price standpoint, this roof makes total sense and is truly comparable to what we would have paid for asphalt shingles,  but it’s a far a superior product.
If anyone is thinking about a metal roof,  talk to Mark Carter at Lifetime.  The conversation is free!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWxMbyy_u2_aX5VlLkhdzL&fid=0x0:0x594fd476b9c5399a"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Harry Neufeld","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4lVV9AkXxbKY2vmRUm--WENziJYt78QVMOeRSnGFSWz71vw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lifetime's crew started and finished the install in one day. The installers were polite and cleaned up after themselves. Roof in our opinion looks great and was competitively priced. Mark the sales manager was easy to deal with and answered all of our questions. We would recommend them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHRXzEj2anap1svC5D9lRA&fid=0x0:0x594fd476b9c5399a"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Chris M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhH8sVSTcBFP5zgih1wO0XAwHYPMJG7QL6MWCP0vC0Qew1WA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What can I tell you these guys were professional and excellent. They were reasonably priced and they did the roof in 2 1/2 days. My home is a large home about 3800 ft.²    They provided a fast efficient and expertly done job.
They were easy to deal with, and I didn’t have to provide any money upfront. I just paid when the work was done.
They were fast in cleaning up and took care of everything as though they had not even been there when the job was finished
I would recommend these people to anyone.
So much so that I will be using them again in the future For my other property","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJL3i_2dj77oew&fid=0x0:0x594fd476b9c5399a"],"When":"2025-5-23"},{"Name":"Anand Janardhan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKcKcAXlvhwI5_PtRiFvM7lBvqPjxQyOrPRRI7nS0cTnKT_Jydhw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a pleasure working with Lifetime Metal Roof to install a metal roof on my detached residential property in Guelph. I would also like to thank Mark Carter for managing the roofing project well and for his prompt communications.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vasyl Yarish","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzuvGr5I6csd_jRelc_5lgmEvtVUGgA_g0_tSBnq573zMac-ED=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a good experience overall. Price was in line and scope of work and options available was made clear.  A five man crew arrived on the date agreed and finished the job in a day, complete with cleanup.  Excellent workmanship with polite and courteous staff.  Will recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nikki Cee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgDd7pmXnRtxwQSZi4Br3FeMhycEwa4yCBBWgkP-Y3RntmmcwHmw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were victims of the no inspections or no house during COVID time. We bought the house in 2021, trusting the word of the seller that our roof was newly done in 2019.

Our roof started leaking 2 winters after we moved in and upon investigation, insurance advised us that our entire attic was covered in mold, and all of our attic insulation and plywood decking had to be replaced. Further, the shingles flew off during the first heavy snowfall due to poor workmanship, and because of no flashing, no window capping, and shingles "from at least 10 years ago", and terrible shingle placement, our entire roof had to be replaced.

We took their report and started looking for a contractor in April 2024.

The company working with the insurance company wouldn't give a quote unless we promised to pay 50% upfront with no payment plan available.

The second place we asked for a quote said he was very sorry for what happened to us but his company was too small to handle the scope of the work. He suggested we look for a large, well-known company that uses their own crews for everything.

We found Nailed it Roofing through Google reviews. The reviews were glowing and the photos looked really good! I liked the there were recent reviews and reviews from way back too - all were positive!

I sent an email requesting a free consult and quote. I received a reply telling me to call their office. Upon calling, I was quickly given an appointment time and day.

I could tell they were really busy when the agent called me back to inform me that they were down a worker for the week and were trying to move people around. However, the agent and the business worked their magic and made my original appointment work.

Martin the project manager was super professional and as my husband says, you can tell he is passionate about his job. We received a presentation with clear explanations. We received distinct packages with different levels of materials and warranties. We were educated about their certifications and how their manufacturer covers the warranties.

There was absolutely no pressure to sign or go with their company. When I asked, we were told that the deposit wouldn't be 50% of the cost, and that as first time roof shoppers, we were probably being duped lol.

It was a very reasonable deposit for the amount of work we were asking. They also advised the balance wouldn't be due until the work was completed. And the work wouldn't be considered completed until we were satisfied.

When I asked for the pricing of additional work that would be extra on top of the roofing, I was not promised anything or guaranteed anything; Martin said he would find out and let me know. I appreciated this because it did not create wild expectations.

Martin reached out within a reasonable timeframe (48hrs) with the additional quotes. His messages were friendly and efficient. We felt confident in his responses.

After deciding which package we wanted to go with, and we reached back out to Martin to confirm, everything moved along quickly from there.

Our project start was delayed due to rainy weather but once the crew came, the work was proficiently and neatly done.

The roofing crew were courteous and tidy. We were so impressed from start to finish of their care. They checked and took photos of our old plywood to show us the mold and photos of the newly installed plywood.

The insulation crew removed the moldy insulation and blew in 20inches of fresh insulation and ensured it was to code. They ensured our house was tidy throughout the process.

The aluminum crew were efficient and completed the job with friendliness and speed. The colour of the eaves matched our shingles so nicely and they kept our front yard so clean during and after installation.

The price was as quoted and everyone treated us and our neighbours with dignity and respect.

We are so pleased with the results and absolutely recommend Martin and Nailed It Roofing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLoOHaxgE&fid=0x0:0xb2ee8b159f1751e9"],"When":"2024-6-14"},{"Name":"Mary Ma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKU-0ax-7w_kyIVJKkjeXxf3E2Aef2tj9zV5hLN9EwwEQZ2xQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was very surprised that they came with a big crew. The site was well organized - the tools and materials were placed on a row, and clean. I have seen many construction sites, but rarely anyone like them.  Damian  manged the job site efficiently, the workers worked professorially, and were well trained.   Damian is a very kind man , he even helped me paint a wood siding area where I could not reach it by myself. When I asked for a quote for gutters and downspouts replacement, Damian went to check and told me that the gutter and downspouts looked ok, and did not need to waste money to be replaced.  Overall, their price is very reasonable, I strongly recommend this company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKm8Pn4wE&fid=0x0:0xb2ee8b159f1751e9"],"When":"2021-4-20"}]

Arash came out and gave his estimate and was able to fit us in quickly as it was a gutter cleaning job. Previous times I’ve had my gutters cleaned, a man walked on the roof and hosed gunk out of gutters. Arash did not do this. The only roof walking was for one section maybe 15ft long where the ladder angle would have been crazy because of the porch underneath. Arash is slight and lean but incredibly strong (former champion boxer!) - never fear for your roof trusses with him walking the roof! For all the rest of the gutters Arash sited his ladder safely and moved it repeatedly as he progressed.  Using washable cloth wipes, he cleared the goo out till the gutters were absolutely clear, putting it all in a bucket as he went. There was no mess! Maybe a few bits on the deck and that’s it! I mean less than a quarter of a dustpan. The man is exceptionally careful. When you seen the job he does, he approaches it with the care he’d put into his own house. He photographed every run so I could see the quality of his work.
He recommended leaf filters (I’ve used them before on lower levels so I know they work, but I’m not willing to get up to the second storey to put them in), and did a super job fitting them.
We have a metal roof and water runs much faster off that than asphalt shingles, so for the front of the house Arash changed the 2.5”x3” downspout to a 3x3 to cope with the quantity of rain coming off the porch roof.
I also had some siding that was loose (and has been forever!). Turns out the bottom lip would never lock as it was positioned too low. Yay,‘professional’ original builders. So Arash screwed that annoying flapping siding in place with almost invisible screw placement.  No more flapping in the winds from now on!
After the job was complete there was a sizeable storm. No more gutters overflowing! WOOHOO Arash, you solved our problem beautifully! Thanks so much.
On a personal note, I found Arash to be a super-polite, caring professional. Very nice to talk to and have working at our house. I’ll have him back for any future work I need done on my roof, the man has integrity and I recommend him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bala K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR7b_7dnhA1YAFoBMHjEanm7xDLnpxR53tyNwEpaJtmYP4Jx0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called "Champion Roofing and Exteriors" for repairing my washroom vent.

As someone who understands the depth of the work involved,  qualities of the workmanship and cost,  I truly appreciate and I highly recommend "Champion Roofing & Exteriors" for any of your needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Varun H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOkikRu0M6Ye5wRbUpWTMedN5kwx4NWwXERfrgsY1U258zQg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I needed two downspouts repaired on the side of our house. I'm very satisfied with the work and professionalism, would definitely use their services again in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"BALA M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_LWZG2yEM3tRlyzVeIyAm_z3Pisw06LZ15n_dHorsZ2MfN3fO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We used ARASH  to repair our Eavestroughs and Downspout. The guys that did the job arrived on time, cleared up after themselves and did a great job.   I would definitely recommend this company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC6LgT9nW8cAacBX7sgtZTX&fid=0x0:0x205b94ba15567ace"],"When":"2025-7-2"},{"Name":"Andrew Boss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIr7oebLWYjS1Z4oMyLUM_4GQeC2EcMo3CukxgR35qo1TtKdg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"UPDATE: I was contacted a couple of weeks later by phone to ensure I was happy with the work. I explained that I was, but had some misgivings as explained below. Joshua called me back promptly and offered to return to my house to complete some more work to make up for the time I paid for, which he did a couple of weeks later. Overall very happy to see that they stand behind their work and are committed to ensuring customer satisfaction, so I've modified to 5 stars.

You can see my original review below:

We recently hired FixMyBrick to complete a variety of small masonry jobs at our home — including foundation parging, window sill repair, chimney cap repair, tuck pointing, and patching holes in the bricks and mortar. The quality of the work they completed was solid, and they did ultimately finish most of what we asked for, however, our overall experience left us feeling misled.

When we received the quote, we were told the work would take the better part of a full day and that we would be charged a “day rate.” The plan, as explained to us, was that the crew would arrive around 9:00 and work until about 4:30 — completing the key repairs first, and using any remaining time to patch as many holes as possible. While the price was on the higher side, this seemed like a reasonable and fair approach, so we agreed.

Unfortunately, the execution didn’t match the plan. After two reschedulings (one for weather, one due to a sick employee), the crew finally arrived at 9:30 on the third scheduled day. They worked for about 2.5 hours, said they had completed the repairs, and were preparing to leave — without doing any of the patching that was part of our agreement. My wife had to press them to continue, and after some back-and-forth (including a lunch break and a call to their boss), they returned and patched holes for roughly 1.5 more hours. They did not patch every hole, and in total, spent only about 4 hours on-site — despite charging us for a full day.

In the end, the work that was done looks good, but we felt the “day rate” pricing was misrepresented. We paid for a full day of labour and received significantly less than that. Good craftsmanship, but disappointing follow-through on the agreement. Would advise others to clarify expectations in writing before committing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCD4t4ET5c9DJyGRfx6RBlB&fid=0x0:0x205b94ba15567ace"],"When":"2025-6-28"},{"Name":"Bugi Amar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL__w2x1b26E7cbu7rZd0bY4Nhplf4z9xMWOdXF4TmFidstiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The owner came to evaluate our issue to give a free quote today. He quickly realized that it was a water damage in our roof and advised us to find a roofing company to fix the issue. He said afterwards we don't even need his services - just clean the bricks surface and that will be all. I am very grateful that he was so honest and didn't try to sell anything to us. I would definitely keep them on my list for future work if I ever need brick repair services. They have integrity so I trust them already.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I have leaks in my 20-year-old shingle roof.

While pricing out roofing options, I discovered that the metal shingles were not significantly more expensive than standard shingles. I also received quotes from two other metal roofing companies and two shingle roofing companies. Ultimately, I chose Viktor and the personal experience Mroof provides. He visited my home, took aerial photos, and measured the perimeter. I received the quote the next day, which was very competitive and easy to understand, including details about the warranty and legalities. The installers arrived promptly and completed the job in a timely manner, leaving the area spotless. I did find a few pieces of metal trim in the garden, but it was getting dark each time they cleaned, so I can’t hold that against them.

It’s only been a few months since the installation, but my wife and I are thoroughly satisfied with the quality, colour, and overall appearance of the new roof. Our neighbours have even complimented the upgraded look. We’ve already experienced punishing weather, including 100 km/h winds, and the roof hasn’t rattled a single time.

Thank you, Viktor and the Mroof team, for the excellent job. I hope we never have to call you again! That’s a good thing! I’ve recommended Mroof to anyone considering a new roof, and I will continue to do so in the future.

Wally from Monarchy was very professional and friendly, providing a reasonable quote with many technical details.
Monarchy offers top-quality Ruukki roofing metal tiles with advanced coating technology. They look amazing, and the entire experience with Monarchy was top-notch. I highly recommend it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOnb2IPJ78qNsgE&fid=0x0:0xd96e6832106532c1"],"When":"2025-5-27"},{"Name":"Adrian D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtCFl5p6mZzg2uwD4Kn7bNDyIWLczrfVrjV1EEMAWsU-HOXQ0CgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There are so many companies doing roofing and you need to ask the right question's. However from the start dealing with Wally he answered questions before I even asked him. You could see he takes pride in what his business is selling. We have just begun installation and will update the review as it progresses. Today as it was the first day right away we were introduced to the Site chief Constantine, he was professional and asked if we could let the neighbours know before they started. I can tell he and his guys care and they were neat putting all the shingles in one area. As we have recently seen other neighbours install their roofs so far this has been great and hopefully the neighbours can appreciate how professional Monarchy Roofing is. I appreciate Kevin is reviewing all the work from the office and reviewing all the work that is being done as they progress.
Vlad was our main installer, the guy has great attention to detail, even the small things every night making sure the front yard and driveway our clean.. if anything falls into the neighbours property asking to go there and clean it up. He found a few issues in our Chimney area, fixed it for us so they can continue with their install. This type of trust is needed and appreciated.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JP Ostiguy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7X5-S4NjaIwWRZe3Q0WjT8UZJ4bRTAz8PLVeASpAfQyUjoTsR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kevin and the crew of Monarchy Roofing are amazing. My wife and I always wanted a steel roof but it wasn't in the budget when we moved into our home 6 yrs ago. About a year and a half ago we had started getting quotes to replace our aging asphalt roof and reached out to many different companies that offered both Steel and asphalt roof options. Kevin from Monarchy was always the first one to respond to my questions and not just with a sales pitch but with options and when I did ask for a quote he was very fair and detailed while some others ignored my calls and emails or were very generic in their response.

A year passed and we were ready to proceed with a roof and I reached out to Kevin again. I was expecting an increase in the quote I recieved with everything going on in the world but was surprised when he stated his costs hadn't changed so the quote was the same as it was over a year ago.

My wife and I booked an appointment to come and see the styles of material and again Kevin was very helpful showing us options and giving us all the information we needed to go ahead with the style we liked.
We have a deposit in March and was told we would have our installation by July as materials have to be ordered for the style we picked. Was good for us.

Coming closer to our install date Kevin kept us informed of the process and the time it would take to install (roughly 5 days weather dependent).

The third week of July finally arrived and the two installers arrived to start the installation. The team was very courteous , respectful and very thorough. 5 days later we had a brand new steel roof which we love. The crew showed up on time everyday and cleaned up every night. This was the first roofing job I have had where there was a walk through at the end and ensured I had any questions answered.

I followed up with Kevin to let him know how happy we were and to arrange final payment on balance. Nothing was added, no surprises and everything was easy and smooth.

I would recommend Monarchy Roofing to anyone who is looking to replace a roof or upgrade. The cost was in line with some asphalt quotes and the over delivery and under promise was appreciated.

Thanks Again

JP","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICp-ZivjAE&fid=0x0:0xd96e6832106532c1"],"When":"2023-8-6"},{"Name":"Maureen Bedford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxWd3MTt4AH2IiNlfU2AOGGDjVI2JQJtoLM-dyDrY87h2-ww=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monarchy Roofing just installed a steel roof and new eavestrough on our house and it was an amazing experience.  Kevin's quote was very competitive and reasonable, he responded to our questions quickly with the greatest of patience and he was able to complete our install in just a few weeks.  The crew at Monarchy was also fantastic working some long days around the weather and were excellent at cleaning up every night. The attention to detail was spectacular - I know because my husband was able to look at it with his drone every night!  We chose Monarchy because of their expertise, guidance and honesty - that's why they have so many good reviews.  They are undoubtedly one of the best companies we have ever worked with.  Looking forward to never having to worry about another roof replacement! We enthusiastically reiterate our 5-star review (I would go higher if Google allowed me) for Roofs on Homes and Danny A. and his expert crew.  They arrived early, worked late and got the job done in 2 days.

(initial review follows below)

*********************

"True Professionals, Expert & Prompt Service"

I contacted Roofs on Homes in November 2020, based on a family member's recommendation. We were seeking a quote for some repairs to busted soffit panels on the south side of our home.

From the first phone call, to the estimate, to our parting fist bump as the Roofs on Homes crew carefully cleaned up after completing their work, I felt we had connected with truly first-class professionals.

Thank you, Danny, for all your work! You were open in helping us identify the various options available to us, to get this particular repair done, and your excellent work was very fairly priced.

If you need work done on your roof,  and you need it done right the first time - definitely give Roofs on Homes a call.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matthew Johnston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrMUZGkxF0NnSoZvikkNWf52hQIY6iYLmSh8En8mc6fs9TQFEAcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I hired Roofs on Homes to perform a complete roof install including new eaves, soffits, and fascia. My experience working with them was amazing  and customer service was always at the forefront.

Danny and everyone else I interacted with from Roofs on Homes were pleasant, timely, and communicative throughout the entire process. They took time to clearly describe the scope of work and problems with my current roof and were not pushy with warranty or extra items. I was impressed with the package of material provided during the quote including insurance certificates, WSIB clearance, and all the details about the products. I had follow-up questions that were responded to promptly, and the few times I called the office I got through immediately and was able to get the answers I needed from Maria. This gave me a lot of comfort if I had issues down the line, but I doubt this will be a problem as long as I am in the house!

Danny gave me ample notice of when the work would start and the crew was on time and professional in every way possible. There were a few unique elements with my roof that were explained to me during the install so I could make an informed decision to ensure I was pleased with the overall look and function. I pointed out where I had previous water issues with a mud room roof install and they described and showed me how they corrected it to ensure I won't have a leak there again.

Manny's team with the aluminum was impressive to watch and you could see the pride that the entire crew took in their work. They covered up a few additional spots of my siding with additional black aluminum to ensure the fit and finish would be pleasing longer-term, and this eye for detail made me very happy. All the eaves were checked methodically to ensure the slope was correct, and they performed wonderfully in a heavy spring storm the day after the install.

Both roofing and aluminum crews took care to protect everything possible on the property to prevent any damage and were immaculate in the clean-up. I received multiple quotes and decided to proceed with Roofs on Homes and couldn't be happier with the outcome.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ian Le Marquand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLr7Yw6dTcEX0n9lCL025vkKnsxmnRnlfmSPrmsyL507vTj8w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After suffering through 12 years of a roof with both poor materials and poor workmanship along with shingles flying off during each wind storm, it was now necessary to have the shingles replaced. It was early December and the window to get a new roof was pretty well closed, but this time I wanted to get it right and not just rely on sales people for my information.
So first, I researched to find who provides the best shingles available for Canadian homes that experience harsh winters and high winds.  It turned out to be Certainteed and their Landmark Pro lineup. My next search was to find a roofing company that had a solid reputation for installing Certainteed products. After meeting with 4 reputable companies and discussing our home’s needs and possible upgrades, the decision was clear. One company stood out that had the best overall reviews and offered a superior package at a competitive price that included upgrades that the other companies did not include in order to keep their prices down.
Roofs on Homes was our final choice. And after multiple discussions with Rich and Danny, watching their installation team at work and seeing their finished product, we know we made the right choice. Right from the beginning, Rich and Danny responded quickly to all of our emails and calls. Communication was quick, clear and welcomed. And we greatly appreciated Danny’s offer to patch up a number of bare spots on our roof to help get us through the winter safely.
As promised, in early April, we received a call from Danny. The weather forecast looked promising over the next few days and so we went ahead with the project. The installation team was amazing. From the moment they arrived, they were courteous, focused and went right to work. Their only stoppage was for a 30-minute lunch break. You could tell this crew was knowledgeable and experienced because of the way they worked so well together. Seamless!
Having begun at 8:30am, the team was completely finished before 6:00pm and our property was left perfectly neat and clean, with great detail taken to prevent any damage to the lawn and landscaping. And it was nice to hear the positive comments from the neighbours on the street and those passing by. And now, with an outstanding 4-star warranty from Certainteed and the quality workmanship of Roofs on Homes, we can sit back and relax knowing we have a first-class Roof On our Home.","Images":null,"When":""}]

August 7/24. Yet another issue with the two replaced sections front and rear.  Please see photo.  Shingles sliding out from the flashing!

Update! July 22/24 Here we are again!  More shingles off the monster roof!

I get it that the roof isn't guaranteed for life but at the age of 11, now 13, I don't expect 10 shingles sporadically to be flying off because of shoddy workmanship.  If the neighbour behind hadn't cut down a tree and told me, it would have been a serious issue.

I contacted the company by email just to have Chris the guy who created problems for 2.5 years (see below) email me telling me no more free fixes.  He should have been fired!

I contacted Michele by phone and still waiting for a call, not a surprise!

I will repost the pictures of the initial roof problems that took 2.5 years to get fixed due to an installation problem.

I didn't make the shingles and I didn't do the job!  One of the newer roofs and the only one losing shingles. 🙄

Here we go again!  We've been having lots of wind but my roof is the only one on the street who's shingles are literally flopping in the wind and it's one of the newer roofs!  A few have blown off!  This roof was done in 2011, had issues already with the front and rear mansards which were replaced and then they had to come back and fix them too!  Unfortunately I can't post videos, the pic just doesn't tell the full story.

Update!  Michele contacted me right away and sent a couple of nice guys to fix the issue!  Thank you Michele

I should have followed through with the Consumer Protection Agency and a lawyer to have the whole roof replaced!

Initial installation

Cherry and Clark installed my roof through Home Depot.  When my shingles began sliding and getting wavy it took 2.5 years and threats of legal action for them to replace it. Cherry & Clark assured us it was and to their word they were able to complete the new roof during the winter months. Our roof is pitched and flat, and Cherry used specialized crews for each.
Above all their communication was excellent and their crews were friendly and respectful!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Brooks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWf9m2gFMGCpvrOU8G6oUxtVdtAX3nZW3OL46VFgrSbt4d_SHM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Cherry and Clark reshingled my roof a year ago.  I wasn’t entirely satisfied with the work for a few reasons:

- The crew seemed inexperienced.  Not one of the six or so workers could have been over 25.  It would have been nice to have at least one seasoned roofer on the job.

- The crew was careless, leaving a roofing shovel behind—eventually returning to pick it up a couple of weeks later.

- There was some property damage.  Oil stains in the driveway and a crushed down border stone caused by one of their vehicles (see photos).  The oil stains were especially frustrating given that I was told someone would come by “ASAP” to clean the stains, but no one came by for two weeks, allowing the stains to bake in the summer sun all that time.  When I followed up on this, Cherry and Clark told me that roofing is a “messy business.”  I’m sure it is, but much less so if you tarp the work area properly.

I wasn’t happy, but not so much that I decided to write a bad review.  I either like to leave good reviews or, if the job isn’t great, no review at all.

Fast forward nearly a year.  Out of the blue Cherry and Clark billed my credit card for several hundred dollars.  I contacted them and this charge was quickly reversed.  But that still begged two questions:

- How was it that Cherry and Clark still had my credit card on record when it was supposed to have been deleted from their system?

- How was I charged several hundred dollars by mistake?

I was told that this would be investigated, but after weeks I still hadn’t received a satisfactory answer.  The part time woman in the accounting department I dealt with was friendly and helpful, but in the end she was unable to come up with an explanation.  The best I could gather was that the accounting department was blaming a sales rep for the improper charge and, in turn, the sales rep was blaming the accounting department.  In the end, no one would be held accountable.

So that’s concerning.  If you hire Cherry and Clark and pay by credit card, I would suggest keeping your eye on any unwarranted charges.  If the company had given me a proper explanation, I’d just write it off to bad luck, but after weeks of ongoing requests a proper explanation was never forthcoming.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCn9CEhPFM_EQu6e1o6QcHG&fid=0x0:0x3d250bfb70da56c7"],"When":"2025-6-25"},{"Name":"Delly G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6agNi8WNRMWmOn4Sqk-32gmJB9mPUKHcRO0xc3hMdaUTZgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Second time using C and C. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Dawn Thomas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKw2g3IM7iAR5jGFlmxjrySb3E5_qoAh2YHImhRoxEAU3CWlA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had put an Interlock roof on our last home, so when we had extensive snow damage to our current homes roof, my first thought was to go with another Interlock.  We did move further North, so was uncertain if the roofing system would be suitable for our extreme winters.   With that in mind we decided to look into other options first....but just could not see us being happy with the other roofs being recommended.  In the end we decided to set up a meeting with Bruce Mehays and discuss the durability of their system in our area.  We received a quote and before making a decision we asked for homes in our area that had the Interlock system installed that had seen at least a few winters.  Honestly anything that survived this past winter was all we needed to see.  We took a drive and looked at the roofs and they all held up to our extreme winter, so decided to put our trust in Interlock once again.  We certainly were not disappointed.  From the start contact with Bruce, to the Booking a start date with Sheldon, to the completion of the project with Maurice and Sam....everything was 5 star service.  Our installers were professional, courteous and hard working.  They worked through the extreme heat wave we had and yet always had a smile and treated us and our property with the upmost respect.  We received daily emails from our salesperson Bruce to see how things were progressing and if we had any concerns, photos sent to us from Maurice to let us see how the progress was coming on the roof.  An area of the roof had some water damage, so we were shown photos of the damage and then the area repaired.  During the repair a wire to our outdoor pot lights were cut, but once that was realized we were informed to contact our electrician and the cost of the repair would be covered by the company.  We certainly have zero complaints and now have a roof that will last us our lifetime and be a great selling feature on our home should we decide to sell.  If you are looking for a quality product and a company who takes pride in their workmanship and holds the bar high on Customer Service than look no further than Interlock Metal Roofing.  We had a 5 star experience from start to finish.  I will include photos of the start to finished product.  We certainly upgraded in both quality and curbside appeal compared to the metal roof that was on this house when we purchased it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGI17_12GSh8ZSQDkITudi&fid=0x0:0x88980255a79dca00"],"When":"2025-8-9"},{"Name":"Marko Petrovski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOPryx6C0bMPGGTGOIO0pu-ESyHlPP98QULQX73vfk4UGF1Ds12g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got the roof done a few weeks ago — John and CJ did an excellent job with the install. Definitely recommend Real blue Roofing for roof maintenance 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKP2gMWsgNLr1AE&fid=0x0:0x955ca316ebaaec0d"],"When":"2025-5-12"},{"Name":"Mike G.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIdihOjxpKob8Zg0IxN9vUCPStwOh06ZyexGAUeQD4yi6jzfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience and excellent workmanship!

Real Blue Roofing came in Nov 2021 to replace our roof due to previous roof leaks (one fixed perfectly by Real Blue Roofing, the other ones on different roof spots we decided it not to fix them, but to do a full roof replacement instead performed by the same company). The roofing team show up early morning (team of 6) and started working right away (shingles were already delivered the day before). One very good thing about this company is that they provide pictures before, during and after job completion, regardless if is just a roof leak or a roof replacement, in our case. I did observe a very good preparation before work started: tarps placed on the front lawn (covering my neighbor's one, as well) and between our house and the neighbor's one, as well (we have a semi-detached house), while the driveway was free for their equipment and the garbage bin. They lay down not just high quality shingles by Owen Cornings, but protective sheets under shingles, as well; roof plywood sheets were inspected and found to be good, however, they could replace up to 5 of them, as per our contract, if required; all roof vents were replaced with new ones, as well. Eavestroughs were inspected and found to be clean and in good condition, as well. During the roof replacement job, they were cleaning up continuously on the ground. No damage at all to our house or my neighbors'.  The job was completed around 4 pm that day; extended clean-up around the house and driveway was professionally completed, followed by eavestroughs cleaning, as well. We are very happy with the job they did on our roof replacement, considering also their 10 years warranty on workmanship which includes lots of factors. By next day early morning I received quite a few pictures through a dedicated hyperlink provided by the company (some being attached to this review). Overall, we are very pleased with the job performed, as well as the interaction with the roof replacement team: well done and Thank you to all the team for such a great job! We've already recommended them to other friends, as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDGgOu2ogE&fid=0x0:0x955ca316ebaaec0d"],"When":"2021-11-14"},{"Name":"Vel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0EzOlyOV9GMoqk-_CQ-VijLlOEV95_errQpDgGCkR-qTXeCilFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Overall, They were very professional, responsive, on time and good value. I will definitely recommend their service.

From start to end, I dealt only with Rythm. He was very prompt and responsive. Got my free quote in 2-3 days. After comparing the quotes from others, I decided to go with Real Blue Roofing because the quotes were competitive also they were very responsive.

Material was delivered 3 days before the actual installation and it got delivered directly to the roof (I didn't know that they can do that lol)

On the day of the installation, Rythm told me that they will start the work at 8. All of them were at my place by 7:45 AM. On time !!! They finished the work by 6. They took extra effort to clean all the debris. In fact they went to my neighbors backyard and clean their places too (just to make sure that there was no nail or anything)

Overall it was hassle free experience and these guys were professional 👌","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDKr4HI4wE&fid=0x0:0x955ca316ebaaec0d"],"When":"2021-5-21"},{"Name":"Preet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuOU49bFcwv_Klj5RZmOaoyUPD4sEl8VKHK_YrxztKsTCjVw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am extremely pleased with the work Real Blue Roofing has done. Not only was the price competitive but the quality of service was excellent as well.
I spent time researching what was needed and asked a lot of questions before making my decision to hire them and I'm glad I did.
Dil provided a quick response to all my questions and concerns. They only used high quality shingles and other products needed to complete the job.
The crew was professional, hardworking and meticulous in detail. Property around the house was covered with tarps/plywoods to collect debris, nails, etc. At the end of the day they cleaned up to the point that you would never know they were even there.
I would definitely recommend them and hire them again for future projects.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICc97u9ZQ&fid=0x0:0x955ca316ebaaec0d"],"When":"2020-4-29"},{"Name":"Wieslaw Buss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKQ0ENUpnNa9a0whOyJDhB5SEg_u4_8JqgMeoiyOX7QuWMd_dz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We're very impressed with the way Mr. Rythm (the Project Manager) presented an estimate.  He has even included a basic guidebook about roofing!

I have to admit that I had several quotes and his presentation was top-notch.

Now, maybe it would look like I asked too many questions; however,  based on advice from competitors/several sources I needed to know:

1. Are you available 24 hours in case of a roofing emergency?
2. Will you be doing step wall flashing?
3. Will you use ridge vents?
4. My roof rafter spacing is 24 inches, so will you use 1/2 or 5/8-inch plywood?
5. All the roofing contractors indicated that my roof has a 5/12 pitch - does it matter in terms of pricing?
6. How much for an extra sheet of plywood?
7. Is the Henry Bakor Ice & Water shield and Rhino Synthetic Underlayment approved by OC (warranty issue)?
8. I have a lot of trees around and pests are "dancing" on my roof, therefore maybe a having drip edge would good idea?
9. Can you comment on this: "Since ice & water shield comes in rolls 3 feet wide, generally one course isn’t enough.  Now, this is where 99% of all roofers get it wrong.  From having been in many continuing education classes myself to renew my Construction Supervisor's License (CSL), I can tell you that many roofers think that only 3' is required.  They have no idea of the actual code dictating the "2 feet past the inside wall". My overhang is 2', so...?

Finally lucky#10: Any senior or promotion discount?

All the questions had been answered positively and precisely with extraordinary communication.

Do not waste time looking for a better "deal". I have done the homework for you.

P.S. An unpleasant visit we had from the Oakville Town enforcement officer who at his "discretion" fined the company due to lack of a local license. It's outrageous that despite living in a democratic country ( I thought so) the officer told me that Oakville Town prefers us to hire local businesses even thou the outsiders offer better deals. Soon we will see checkpoints at the town's borders.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDescbSOw&fid=0x0:0x955ca316ebaaec0d"],"When":"2022-10-12"}]

From start to finish, they were clean, professional, and extremely organized. They completed the entire roof replacement in just one day, working carefully to ensure that no materials were left scattered around the property. By the end of the day, the driveway and the backyard were spotless — no garbage, no damage, and I have a beautiful new roof.

Today as I am writing this, it rained very heavy and hard all night and no sign of any leaks, water went into the eaves perfectly from the roof, and as far as the noise, the rain hitting the windows was way louder than the rain making noise on the steel roof.
